query:
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dt_ref)::int4 AS "mes!",
                  SUM(qtd_vendida)::float8        AS "total!",
                  COUNT(DISTINCT dt_ref)          AS "dias!"
           FROM pcp.vendas_dia
           WHERE dt_ref >= $1 AND dt_ref < $2 AND qtd_vendida > 0
           GROUP BY 1
           ORDER BY 1
